cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Neuro-symbolic legal assistant: the LLM handles language understanding and cited explanation over Nigerian labour/tenancy/tax statutes (8 acts), while a deterministic rules engine performs all statutory computation — PAYE tax bands, employment notice periods, Lagos tenancy notice bands, and redundancy entitlements, each encoded from the gazette text. A deterministic citation verifier checks every legal claim against the local corpus before display; failed claims trigger one constrained regeneration. Remove either component and the product breaks.

test_prompts.prompt: My employer in Lagos made me redundant after 6 years of service. What are my entitlements under Nigerian labour law?
My oga sack me from work without notice, and I don work there for 4 years. Wetin I fit do under Nigeria labour law?
